creator: moggie@elasticmind.net
text:
Approved - personally haven't tried parallel builds, but this seems 
quite sensible to me. Thanks.


On 18/06/2010 17:00, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of irc/ratbox-services,
>
> Please note that PR ports/147977 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>      http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/147977
